title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates:
Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates!
